Spring Data Relational Parent
  1. org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert

Packages that use org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.config
Configuration classes for Spring Data R2DBC.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert
R2DBC-specific conversion and converter implementations.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.core
Core domain types around DatabaseClient.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.query
Query and update support.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.repository.query
Query support for R2DBC repositories.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.repository.support
Support infrastructure for query derivation of R2DBC-specific repositories.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert used by org.springframework.data.r2dbc.config
    Class
    Description
    IdGeneratingEntityCallback
    Callback for generating identifier values through a database sequence.
    MappingR2dbcConverter
    Converter for R2DBC.
    R2dbcConverter
    Central R2DBC specific converter interface.
    R2dbcCustomConversions
    Value object to capture custom conversion.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert used by org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert
    Class
    Description
    R2dbcConverter
    Central R2DBC specific converter interface.
    R2dbcCustomConversions
    Value object to capture custom conversion.
    R2dbcCustomConversions.R2dbcConverterConfigurer
    R2dbcCustomConversions.R2dbcConverterConfigurer encapsulates creation of R2dbcCustomConversions.R2dbcCustomConversionsConfiguration with R2DBC specifics.
